requirements.requirement_text: This is a standing operating system goal; the holding plane operates forever and does not close.
requirements.finding: The audit records objective_status=standing_non_closing and the handoff close rule says not to mark the standing goal complete.

requirements.requirement_text: ZestStream is the management plane for a portfolio of AI-native businesses.
requirements.finding: The registry and gate audit exist, but counted_portfolio_companies is still 0.

requirements.requirement_text: The customer is an SMB owner-operator.
requirements.finding: Candidate-fit and owner-voice ledgers exist, but no candidate currently proves SMB owner-operator target or owner voice.

requirements.requirement_text: Owner-operator takes 25% equity plus tiered 45-75% profit distributions.
requirements.finding: Owner-economics validator exists, but no signed owner/cap-table/distribution/legal refs exist for Mobile Eats.

requirements.requirement_text: Joshua builds shared substrate: SkillOS, flywheel, and @zeststream/*.
requirements.finding: Flywheel and @zeststream package evidence are present, SkillOS adoption has proof, but full NURTURE stack remains blocked by missing JSM and formed-company operating receipts.

requirements.requirement_text: Each next launch gets cheaper than the last through substrate reuse.
requirements.finding: Baseline substrate reuse exists for Mobile Eats, but there is no second comparable launch row proving N+1 cheaper than N.

requirements.requirement_text: PEEL discovers candidates from client talks, community, or field-trip insight and requires five buying-signal interviews before formation cash.
requirements.finding: PEEL interview ledger exists, but no candidate has source provenance plus five qualified interviews.

requirements.requirement_text: PRESS compounds on substrate to v0.1 plus signed equity.
requirements.finding: PRESS readiness ledger exists, but Mobile Eats lacks v0.1 release, SkillOS hardening, and signed-equity receipts.

requirements.requirement_text: POUR launches as own brand with public surface, first paying customer, and operating-control handoff.
requirements.finding: Brand/repo/public surface evidence exists, but first paying customer, owner-operator, and operating-control handoff receipts are absent.

requirements.requirement_text: NURTURE shares SkillOS, JSM, packages, brand voice, and enables Tier 2+ peer coaching for 5% equity.
requirements.finding: Shared-stack and peer-coach ledgers exist, but Mobile Eats lacks JSM/full stack receipts and no Tier 2+ owner exists.

requirements.requirement_text: RECYCLE turns friction into new SkillOS capability plus packages and portfolio propagation.
requirements.finding: RECYCLE ledger exists, but no friction item has landed as SkillOS capability plus package/substrate upgrade with propagation evidence.

requirements.requirement_text: Joshua personal-runway gate: 18+ months before sub #1 and 24+ months before sub #4.
requirements.finding: Runway receipt contract exists, but current status is not_provided.

requirements.requirement_text: A portfolio company does not exist until it has signed owner-operator and first paying-customer receipts in registry.
requirements.finding: Registry refuses to count Mobile Eats because signed owner, equity, and first-customer receipts are missing.

requirements.requirement_text: Public voice says sharpen legacy, incubate new; not workflow-builder or custom-app-builder.
requirements.finding: Voice gates exist, but public surfaces and founder-post draft still fail current checks.

requirements.requirement_text: Joshua hours cap at 60/week from Year 2 and substrate must measurably offset coaching time.
requirements.finding: Sustainable-pace ledger exists, but weekly hours and substrate offset are not measured.

requirements.requirement_text: Subs #1-2 use warm-network owner search; public open-call activates from sub #3.
requirements.finding: Owner-search phasing ledger exists, but sub #1 has no warm-network source proof.

requirements.requirement_text: Operating agreement covers holding-co, peer-coach, annual tier review, and substrate pool before sub #2 signs an owner.
requirements.finding: Legal scaffold exists, but binding artifact, attorney review, and CPA review refs are absent.

requirements.requirement_text: 4,000+ commits in 7 days across 9 product surfaces.
requirements.finding: Replayable ledger blocks the claim at 3,755 sampled commits and no exact surface-set proof.

requirements.requirement_text: Mobile Eats shipping; first portfolio company on shared substrate with 9+ package adoptions.
requirements.finding: Product/substrate shipping and 27 packages are proven; first-portfolio-company proof is blocked.

requirements.requirement_text: anthropic-sdk-python adoption OK across three consumer repos.
requirements.finding: Anthropic adoption ledger validates against SkillOS canonical gate and source pack-applied rows.

requirements.requirement_text: zeststream-brand-voice skill enforces canon and grounding.
requirements.finding: Grounding exists, but current JSM-managed voice canon still carries older SMB time-back wording and lacks approved holding-company anti-builder receipt.

requirements.requirement_text: SkillOS Forever-OS v3 ratified 2026-05-16 and structure locked 2026-05-17.
requirements.finding: V3 goal and operating receipts are present; distinct 2026-05-17 structure-lock receipt is missing.

requirements.requirement_text: ZestStream no longer builds custom apps or workflows for clients.
requirements.finding: The public-story and anti-pitch ledgers still detect builder or automation framing on public surfaces.

requirements.requirement_text: Each business gets its own name, owner, brand, and customers.
requirements.finding: Mobile Eats has own-brand/product proof, but owner, customer, and naming provenance receipts are absent.

requirements.requirement_text: Joshua coaches owners and picks the next bet at a sustainable pace.
requirements.finding: Coach-role and pace ledgers exist, but no owner/control handoff or pace measurement receipts exist.

requirements.requirement_text: A year out: small portfolio of named companies, each with owner equity deal, making money, all on same foundation.
requirements.finding: No counted companies, no signed owner-economics receipts, and no revenue/profit receipts exist yet.

requirements.requirement_text: A future nonprofit extends this to social-cause work.
requirements.finding: Future nonprofit extension ledger exists and intentionally defers readiness until scope, legal, governance, separation, funding, and public-story receipts exist.

requirements.requirement_text: The public story is show the receipts, not build the apps.
requirements.finding: Public-story and founder-post ledgers exist, but current surfaces/posts do not yet clear receipt-led holding-company positioning.

requirements.requirement_text: Individual companies may close, pivot, or graduate while the holding plane continues.
requirements.finding: Lifecycle-disposition ledger exists and tracks the path, but no disposition event has occurred.

notes: This is a prompt-to-artifact checklist, not a completion claim.
The standing holding-company objective cannot be marked complete; this matrix records current coverage and blockers.
next_action: Use this matrix as the closeout checklist for future holding-company passes; fill blocked rows with durable receipts rather than treating proxy tests as completion.
